zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Anne Foliot於1495年1月10日出生在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特時，她的父親Nicholas Foliot43歲，母親Elizabeth Washbourne43歲。她於1519年與Sir Walter Stonor在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1555年1月1日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Anne Foliot于1495年1月10日出生在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特时，她的父亲Nicholas Foliot43岁，母亲Elizabeth Washbourne43岁。她于1519年与Sir Walter Stonor在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1555年1月1日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Anne Foliot was born on 10 January 1495, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, her father, Nicholas Foliot, was 43 and her mother, Elizabeth Washbourne, was 43. She married Sir Walter Stonor in 1519, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 1 January 1555, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Anne Foliot est née le 10 janvier 1495, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Foliot, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Washbourne, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Stonor en 1519, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1555, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Loughborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Anne Foliot am 10. Januar 1495 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Foliot 43 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Washbourne 43. Sie hat 1519 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Walter Stonor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1555 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Anne Foliot è nata il il 10 gennaio 1495 nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Nicholas Foliot, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Washbourne, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Stonor nel 1519, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 gennaio 1555, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Anne Foliotが1495年1月10日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで生まれた時，父Nicholas Foliotは43歳，母Elizabeth Washbourneは43歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでSir Walter Stonorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1555年1月1日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアロウボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 스탠퍼드 인 테 발
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Anne Foliot(이)가 1495년 1월 10일 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Foliot(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Washbourne(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Sir Walter Stonor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1555년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 루그h버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Anne Foliot nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1495, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Foliot, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Washbourne, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Stonor em 1519, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1555, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stanford in the Vale, Berkshire, England: станфорд ин т веил, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Anne Foliot родилась 10 января 1495 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Foliot было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Washbourne, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Stonor в 1519 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 января 1555 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности лоугбороую, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Walter Stonor en 1519, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de enero de 1555, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
